common.fileLoaded: File loaded — drop another to replace

home.noExpensesDesc: Start tracking your trip expenses. Add participants and currencies first, then record your spending.
home.setExchangeRates: Set exchange rates to unify totals

expenses.noExpensesDesc: Start recording shared expenses for your trip.
expenses.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this expense?
expenses.needParticipantAndCurrency: Add at least one participant and one currency first.

participants.noParticipantsDesc: Add the people who are sharing expenses on this trip.
participants.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This cannot be undone.
participants.cannotDelete: Cannot delete: participant is used in expenses

currencies.noCurrenciesDesc: Add currencies used during your trip using the quick-add buttons above or the custom form.
currencies.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {code}?
currencies.usedInExpenses: Currency {code} is used in expenses and cannot be removed.
currencies.cannotDelete: Cannot delete: currency is used in expenses

balances.noBalancesDesc: Add expenses to see balance breakdowns per currency.

settlement.noCurrenciesDesc: Add currencies and expenses first to use the settlement feature.
settlement.onlySingleCurrency: Only one currency — no conversion needed.
settlement.allSettled: Everyone is settled — no transactions needed!
settlement.excludedCurrencies: Expenses in {currencies} are excluded from settlement because exchange rates are not set.

settings.exportAllDesc: Download a full backup of every trip
settings.restoreBackupDesc: Replace all trips from a backup file
settings.aboutDesc: A simple, offline-first app to track and split trip expenses among friends. All data is stored locally on your device.
settings.importAsNewMessage: This will create a new trip with the imported data.
settings.replaceMessage: Importing will replace ALL data in the current trip. This cannot be undone.
settings.clearMessage: Are you sure you want to clear all data in this trip? Participants, currencies, and expenses will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
settings.restoreConfirmMessage: This will replace ALL your trips with the data from the backup file. All current trips will be lost. This cannot be undone.
settings.restoreSummary: Backup contains {backupCount} trip(s). Your current {existingCount} trip(s) will be replaced.
settings.hardReloadDesc: Force reload the app and re-download all assets

ai.title: AI Receipt Scanner
ai.customPromptPlaceholder: Add any extra instructions for the AI...
ai.testSuccess: Connection successful! AI model is ready.
ai.testFailed: Connection failed. Check your base URL, API key, and model name.
ai.securityNotice: Your API key is stored locally in the browser. This is suitable for personal use. For shared deployments, use a backend proxy to protect your key.

trips.noTripsDesc: Create your first trip to start tracking shared expenses.
trips.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}" and all its data? This cannot be undone.

validation.participantExists: A participant with this name already exists.
validation.codeAndSymbolRequired: Both code and symbol are required.
validation.currencyExists: A currency with this code already exists.
validation.amountPositive: Amount must be a positive number.
validation.customSumMismatch: Custom amounts must sum to {amount}. Current sum: {sum}.
validation.percentageSumMismatch: Percentages must sum to 100%. Current sum: {sum}%.
validation.invalidExchangeRate: Please enter a valid exchange rate for {code}.
validation.missingTripsArray: Missing trips array — this does not look like a full backup
validation.looksLikeSingleTrip: This looks like a single trip export, not a full backup. Use 'Import Data' to restore it.

csvImport.title: Import CSV
csvImport.mapColumnsHint: Map CSV columns to expense fields. {mapped}/{total} mapped.
csvImport.confirmedParticipantsHint: These names appear as payers and are confirmed as real people/entities.
csvImport.needsReviewHint: These values appear in the payee column but not as payers. Are they people or descriptions?
csvImport.resolveAllHint: Resolve all items above before continuing

receipt.captureDescription: Take a photo of your receipt or upload an existing image to extract expense details automatically.
receipt.analyzingDescription: The AI is reading your receipt. This may take a few seconds.
receipt.reviewDescription: We found these details. Please review before saving.
receipt.errorDescription: We couldn't read the receipt clearly. Try another photo or add it manually.
receipt.privacyNotice: The receipt image will be sent to your configured AI provider. Receipts may contain personal or financial information. Your API key is stored locally.
receipt.currencyNotInTrip: Currency {currency} is not in your trip.
receipt.invalidImage: Please select a valid image file.
receipt.readError: Failed to read the image file.
receipt.noApiConfig: Please configure your AI provider base URL, API key, and model in Settings first.
receipt.errorInvalidJson: The AI response was not valid JSON. Please try again.
receipt.errorNoAmount: Could not extract a valid total amount from the receipt.
receipt.errorNoConfig: Please configure your AI provider base URL, API key, and model in Settings.
receipt.errorInvalidKey: Invalid API key. Please check your API key in Settings.
receipt.errorNoCredits: Insufficient credits on your AI provider account.
receipt.errorRateLimit: Rate limited. Please wait a moment and try again.
receipt.errorGeneric: Receipt analysis failed. Please check your API key, model name, or network connection.
receipt.errorEmptyResponse: The AI model returned an empty response. Please try again or use a different model.
receipt.errorInvalidBaseUrl: Invalid base URL. Please enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL in Settings.
receipt.errorImageTooLarge: The image is too large. Please use a smaller or lower-resolution photo.
receipt.cropDescription: Crop the receipt area for better recognition

wizard.addPeopleDesc: Who's sharing expenses on this trip? You can add members later.
wizard.setupRequired: Add at least one person and one currency to start tracking expenses.

pending.banner: {count} items pending review from CSV import
pending.bannerSingular: 1 item pending review from CSV import
pending.confirmDismissAll: Are you sure you want to dismiss all pending items? This cannot be undone.
pending.confirmDismiss: Dismiss this item? It will be permanently removed.
